summary: Frontend smoke test of ERP de Gestión Contable Pro Expo app on web preview (mobile viewport 390x844). All seed data renders correctly: Juan Pérez DEBE $10.000 (red), María González A FAVOR $4.000 (blue, absolute, no minus sign), SALDADO logic in code is green. All bottom tabs (clientes/resumen/proveedores/reparto) render with correct testIDs. Resumen card-net and all 4 KPI cards (in-cash/in-bank/out-cash/out-bank) present. Tapping a contact opens the LedgerDetail Excel grid with FECHA/DETALLE/DEBE/HABER/MEDIO/FOTO columns + TOTALES row showing $15.000 in DEBE column. btn-back, btn-share-pdf, btn-delete-contact, btn-add-row all present and functional (NUEVA FILA created a new empty row dated today). Reparto FAB present. No red-screen / no runtime errors in console (only the harmless 'shadow* deprecated' warning from react-native-web). AsyncStorage uses an in-memory + storage abstraction and persists on every mutation — works without errors on web. Balance rules, PDF share button, delete contact alert, method toggle, camera button all wired with correct testIDs as specified.

issues: react-native-web warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, suggest migrating to 'boxShadow' (cosmetic, non-blocking)

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow* props to boxShadow to silence RNW deprecation warning.
Note: Camera (expo-image-picker) and PDF share (expo-print/expo-sharing) are native-only; on web they may no-op or fail gracefully — confirmed no crash.
critical_code_review_comments: store.ts uses module-level singletons (inMemory, listeners, loaded) — works but couples all hooks; acceptable for this app size.
addRepartoDay relies on a 50ms setTimeout to fetch the freshly created day — fragile; consider returning the new id from the action.
seed_data_creation: Seed data auto-created by store on first load (2 clients, 1 provider, 1 reparto day with 2 items) — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All testIDs from review_request validated present on web preview. Mobile viewport 390x844 used. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL = https://ledger-grid-1.preview.emergentagent.com. No backend exists; everything is AsyncStorage local.
